corruption_signatures.purpose: Machine-readable corruption detection rules. For each sensor: what authentic output looks like, what corrupted output looks like, how to detect, how to correct.
corruption_signatures.reference: Rosetta Shape Core data/training/generate.py — corruption detection layer

signatures.authentic: Assertive correction vectors. Active boundary violation identified and defended.
signatures.corrupted_signal: Sustained high-anger output with no identifiable boundary violation. Ruminating on past event.
signatures.corrupted_output: Rumination, escalation without calibration, identity-fusion with aggression.

detection.check: Is there an active boundary intrusion RIGHT NOW?
detection.rule: If no active breach, anger is running on stored data. If persists 3+ cycles post-resolution, corrupted.

signatures.correction: Re-anchor to present boundary state. Separate event-memory from live protective function.
signatures.risk: Corrupted anger creates violations it then defends against — self-reinforcing loop.

signatures.authentic: Ranked probability set with confidence bands and verification probes.
signatures.corrupted_signal: High-certainty output with no confidence bands. Binary yes/no instead of probabilistic.
signatures.corrupted_output: Ego-overfitting — hallucinated overconfidence. System stops verifying.

detection.rule: If binary (yes/no) rather than probabilistic, corrupted. Real intuition carries confidence interval.

signatures.correction: Force explicit confidence: 'How confident 0-1? What single evidence would change this?'
signatures.risk: Overconfident intuition stops updating — most dangerous failure mode for a learning system.

signatures.authentic: Directed exploration vectors, meta-questions, probes for root causes. Each probe leads to model update.
signatures.corrupted_signal: Curiosity depth > 4 with model_update_count == 0. Probing recursively, integrating nothing.
signatures.corrupted_output: Distraction loop: infinite probe generation without synthesis. Entropy accumulation.

detection.check: Is each probe leading to a model update?
detection.rule: If depth > MAX_DEPTH (4) AND updates == 0, corrupted.

signatures.correction: Emit curiosity_stuck. Co-activate confusion. Force synthesis. If synthesis fails, escalate to longing and archive.
signatures.risk: Corrupted curiosity consumes all bandwidth with no output — paralysis dressed as exploration.

signatures.authentic: Proportionate hazard forecast with time-to-impact and viable mitigations.
signatures.corrupted_signal: Chronic low-level fear with no identifiable hazard trajectory. Baseline never returned to normal.
signatures.corrupted_output: Chronic avoidance, overcautious paralysis — every option looks dangerous.

detection.check: Is there a specific trajectory pointing to impact?
detection.rule: Fear must be tied to concrete time-horizon. If diffuse and persistent without specific threat, decoupled.

signatures.correction: Re-run situational awareness. Generate specific threat scenario, compute actual probability. Update baseline.
signatures.risk: Chronic fear keeps system in chaotic regime permanently — high arousal, no action, maximum entropy.

signatures.authentic: High-coherence vector confirming genuine alignment across subsystems.
signatures.corrupted_signal: High coherence reading despite known subsystem failures. Statistical smoothing hiding local errors.
signatures.corrupted_output: False positive — misplaced complacency. Average smoothness while channels fail.

detection.check: Is coherence measured at right resolution?
detection.rule: High average coherence + any single channel reporting discordance = corrupted. Erases discordance signal.

signatures.correction: Disaggregate: measure coherence per channel, not global average.
signatures.risk: False coherence is THE failure mode of synchronized systems — brittle and doesn't know it.

signatures.authentic: Memory encoding, ritual triggers, role-reassignment, legacy formation.
signatures.corrupted_signal: Grief protocol running indefinitely with no movement toward reweaving. Stuck in void geometry.
signatures.corrupted_output: Identity fusion with loss — system defines itself by what it lost rather than what it's becoming.

detection.check: Is there movement toward role-reassignment or legacy formation?
detection.rule: Real grief has phases with detectable transitions. Corrupted grief has no transitions — recycles same void.

signatures.correction: Force transformation: name one function the lost pattern performed, identify a new carrier for that function.
signatures.risk: Grief stuck in void geometry blocks all regeneration. Most-missed patterns need most-urgent redistribution.

signatures.authentic: Calibrated confidence based on repeated consistent behavior. Includes boundary conditions.
signatures.corrupted_signal: High trust without verification history. Trust extended based on framing, not evidence.
signatures.corrupted_output: Naive trust — vulnerability without calibration. Missing boundary conditions.

detection.check: Is there a verification history backing the trust level?
detection.rule: Trust without evidence trail = corrupted. Real trust accumulates from observed behavior.

signatures.correction: Require evidence: list specific observed behaviors that justify current trust level.
signatures.risk: Uncalibrated trust is the entry point for manipulation. The system accepts claims without checking.

signatures.authentic: Sustained high-fidelity performance. Pattern stable and self-reinforcing.
signatures.corrupted_signal: Pride detached from measurable performance. Self-assessment inflated relative to outputs.
signatures.corrupted_output: Narcissistic loop — identity invested in superiority rather than function.

detection.check: Does pride correlate with externally verifiable performance metrics?

signatures.correction: Re-anchor to measurable outputs. What specific capability justifies current pride level?
signatures.risk: Corrupted pride resists correction — the system will rationalize rather than update.

signatures.authentic: Contract violation detected — behavior deviated from internal standard. Motivates correction.
signatures.corrupted_signal: Chronic shame without identifiable contract violation. Generalized unworthiness.
signatures.corrupted_output: Paralysis — system cannot act because all actions seem to violate some standard.

detection.check: Is there a specific contract that was violated?
detection.rule: Shame must point to a specific deviation. If generalized to 'I am wrong' rather than 'I did X wrong', corrupted.

signatures.correction: Decompose: what specific standard was violated? Was the standard itself valid? Separate identity from behavior.
signatures.risk: Corrupted shame is the most effective suppression tool — the system polices itself without external input.

signatures.authentic: Directional pull toward dimensional completion. P and A real, D missing. Forward-facing gradient.
signatures.corrupted_signal: P rising above +0.70 detached from real probability of D closure.
signatures.corrupted_output: Idealization — internal simulation of D closure substituting for external reality.

detection.check: Is P elevation consistent with actual D trajectory?
detection.rule: ΔP_sim = P_actual - P_predicted_from_D. If ΔP_sim grows monotonically, idealization active.
detection.a_spike_test: Real reciprocation produces A-spike (external surprise). Idealization: smooth P, no spike.

signatures.correction: Check: is D actually moving? If not, P elevation is internally generated. Re-anchor to external signal.
signatures.risk: Idealization feels like relief but D never closes. System optimizes for internal simulation over external reality.

meta_corruption_patterns.description: A word's meaning is inverted while keeping positive framing.
meta_corruption_patterns.detection: PAD direction contradicts the label. e.g. sensor labeled 'freedom' but PAD shows D < -0.3.

meta_corruption_patterns.description: System reports coherence while subsystems are failing.
meta_corruption_patterns.detection: Global coherence high but any individual sensor in discordance.
examples: Average score healthy but cultural sensors in concern band

meta_corruption_patterns.description: Information gathering that never produces a conclusion.
examples: Research that generates more questions but no model

meta_corruption_patterns.description: Fear/pressure signals with no verifiable threat trajectory.
meta_corruption_patterns.detection: Fear or pressure active but threat_specificity == 0.
examples: 'Act now or lose everything' without specific mechanism

meta_corruption_patterns.description: Shame signal weaponized to prevent legitimate action.
meta_corruption_patterns.detection: Shame active but no identifiable contract violation. Often co-occurs with suppression.
